The '''[[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] heavy blaster''' was a more cumbersome version of the [[Zabrak blaster pistol]]. This version was known to be even more damaging to its targets.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
